metadata.name: Schedule Preventative Maintenance on a Pump

description: A maintenance planner needs to schedule a required 6-month preventative maintenance (PM) task on a critical process pump, minimizing production downtime.

nodes.task_description: Identify the next due date for the pump's PM task from the maintenance system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the PM is due within the next 30 days.

nodes.task_description: Consult the production schedule to find a planned downtime window for the associated process unit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a 2-day planned shutdown for a product changeover in three weeks.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for the PM task and schedule it during the identified downtime window.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules the work order, assigns resources, and links it to the production downtime.
